tasks.subject: Task 0: i18n Infrastructure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install dependencies, create i18n config, wrap app in provider, create common namespace JSON.

**Files:**
- Modify: frontend/package.json
- Create: frontend/src/i18n.js
- Modify: frontend/src/main.jsx
- Create: frontend/src/locales/en/*.json (8 files)

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/package.json", "frontend/src/i18n.js", "frontend/src/main.jsx", "frontend/src/locales/en/common.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["react-i18next installed", "i18n.js initializes i18next", "main.jsx imports i18n", "app starts normally"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Auth Namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize LoginPage and RegisterPage strings into auth.json.

**Files:**
- Create: frontend/src/locales/en/auth.json
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.jsx
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.jsx

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/locales/en/auth.json", "frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No hardcoded strings in auth files", "Pages render identically"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Common Namespace — AppLayout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize navigation and layout strings in AppLayout.

**Files:**
- Modify: frontend/src/locales/en/common.json
- Modify: frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/locales/en/common.json", "frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No hardcoded strings in AppLayout", "Nav renders identically"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dashboard Namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize DashboardPage strings including complex interpolation and plurals.

**Files:**
- Create: frontend/src/locales/en/dashboard.json
- Modify: frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/locales/en/dashboard.json", "frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No hardcoded strings", "Plurals use _one/_other convention", "Greeting interpolation works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Ritual Namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize all strings in 9 ritual-related files.

**Files:**
- Create: frontend/src/locales/en/ritual.json
- Modify: 9 files (EndDayPage, EndRitualPage, StartWeekPage, StartMonthPage, CompletionPhase, DailyReflectionPhase, InboxPhase, TaskSchedulePhase, TaskTriagePhase)

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/locales/en/ritual.json", "frontend/src/components/ritual/CompletionPhase.jsx", "frontend/src/components/ritual/DailyReflectionPhase.jsx", "frontend/src/components/ritual/InboxPhase.jsx", "frontend/src/components/ritual/TaskSchedulePhase.jsx", "frontend/src/components/ritual/TaskTriagePhase.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No hardcoded strings in ritual files", "Energy/mood labels extracted", "Day abbreviations extracted", "Date formatting uses Intl"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Tasks Namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize all strings in task/project files and active session files.

**Files:**
- Create: frontend/src/locales/en/tasks.json
- Modify: 13 files (ProjectsPage, ProjectDetailPage, TodayPage, AddTaskModal, TaskDetailModal, TaskDetailPanel, TaskList, TaskRow, EventList, ActiveSessionPage, SubtaskChecklist, TimerCircle)

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/locales/en/tasks.json", "frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/ActiveSessionPage.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No hardcoded strings", "Date formatting locale-aware", "EventList time formatting locale-aware"]}
```

tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize all strings in InboxPage, QuickCapture, and deferred components.

```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Time Blocking Namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize all strings in StartDayPage and sub-components.

**Files:**

- Modify: 6 files (StartDayPage, EventBlock, TaskBrowserRow, TaskCard, TimeBlock, TimeBlockGrid)

```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Admin Namespace
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Externalize all strings in admin pages and shared admin components.

**Files:**
- Create: frontend/src/locales/en/admin.json
- Modify: 12 files (AdminPage, 7 table pages, AdminCrudPage, AdminFormModal, AdminTable, DeleteConfirmDialog)

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/locales/en/admin.json", "frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminPage.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/admin/components/DeleteConfirmDialog.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No hardcoded strings", "Entity interpolation works", "Plurals in DeleteConfirmDialog use i18next"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Verification & Cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify the entire app renders correctly with all strings externalized.

**Verify:** `cd e2e && npx playwright test`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd e2e && npx playwright test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "npm run lint passes", "E2E tests pass", "Grep finds no remaining hardcoded strings"]}
```
